name: flesh-out-scaffolded-repo
description: Fill gaps in scaffolded repos to make them production-ready: add justfile + pixi.toml, build scripts, READMEs, and fix bash syntax bugs, hardcoded values, and script logic errors. Use when: (1) a repo was scaffolded and pushed but is missing task runner files, (2) compose/Nomad/CI files have hardcoded paths that should be env vars, (3) shell scripts have syntax errors or suppressed failures.
